name: Scayle
description: Enterprise composable commerce (ex-ABOUT YOU) with headless APIs and SDKs.

seo.title: Scayle — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Scayle: Enterprise composable commerce (ex-ABOUT YOU) with headless APIs and SDKs.

when_to_use: Headless e-commerce stack with composable APIs and SDKs
Enterprise B2B commerce platform with custom storefront
Migrating from monolith to composable commerce via Scayle
Marketplace setup with headless architecture on Scayle
Custom checkout experience with Scayle's API-first approach

pros: Headless APIs built from ABOUT YOU scale
Proven at millions of SKUs and orders
cons: Smaller ecosystem than Shopify or commercetools
review.verdict: Battle-tested composable commerce for enterprises, but overkill and expensive for anything below mid-market.
review.best_for: European fashion and lifestyle enterprises needing proven high-scale headless commerce
review.not_for: SMBs and startups where Shopify or Medusa would ship faster
